title: lora_l2.c:596 lichen_lora_l2_start checks UNINIT but not is_running
description: Contract violation: lichen_lora_l2_start() - The state switch at lines 600-618 handles all states correctly, but the initial lora_get_state() at line 598 is done without mutex. The double-check at line 623 is under mutex but creates a window where concurrent start() could pass. Both attempts to transition to RUNNING could race through lora_transition(). WHY: lora_transition() uses atomic_set not CAS, so concurrent starts could both succeed causing undefined thread behavior. HOW to fix: Use lora_transition_from(LORA_STOPPED, LORA_RUNNING) instead of lora_transition() at line 672.
